data.name: My Crush is a Clerk from Hell
data.detailed_description:
NEW GAME FROM ME!


關於此遊戲

My Crush is a Clerk from Hell is a short, cozy slice-of-life dating sim about late nights, quiet conversations, and a succubus trying to remember what love feels like.
You’ll visit the corner shop again and again, getting to know Sam, a sharp-tongued, surprisingly honest demon who’s lost her powers and maybe her way.

Genre: Visual Novel + Card Battler

Setting: A sleepy neighbourhood corner shop that feels a little too alive at night

Main Role: You’re an ordinary customer who keeps coming back, not for the milk, but for the mysterious new clerk who swears she’s from Hell

Core Loop:

  • Visit the shop and talk with Sam after hours

  • Learn about her world through quiet, funny, and heartfelt conversations

  • Make choices that test honesty, trust, and affection

Romance Path:

  • Grow closer through banter, small acts of kindness, and late-night visits

  • Your honesty shapes Sam’s fate pure love can set her free, while doubt keeps her trapped

data.short_description: My Crush is a Clerk from Hell is a lighthearted dating sim about falling in love with a succubus hiding in plain sight.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
